name: Tofu Scramble
tagline: Crumbled tofu seasoned with kala namak, turmeric, and nutritional yeast
highlight: Kala namak (black salt) gives the eggy sulfur note — without eggs

hero.alt: Tofu scramble with chives on toast
hero.caption: tofu scramble — eggy without eggs

healthFacts: No eggs — kala namak (black salt) provides the sulfur note.
Firm tofu has ~20g protein per cup of crumbles.
Nutritional yeast adds fortified B12 — important on plant-based diets.

steps.title: Press and crumble
steps.detail: Press tofu in a clean towel for 5 min. Crumble into bite-size, irregular chunks — like soft scrambled eggs.
steps.tip: Press = less water = better browning. Don't skip.

steps.title: Sizzle the tofu
steps.detail: Heat olive oil in a non-stick skillet over medium-high. Add tofu and cook 4 min, tossing, until edges are gold.
steps.tip: Don't move it constantly — let the bottom set, then flip.

steps.title: Spice and creamy
steps.detail: Stir in turmeric, garlic powder, nutritional yeast. Pour in plant milk; toss until creamy and the tofu turns yellow.
steps.tip: Plant milk steams off and leaves seasoning behind, mimicking custard set.

steps.title: Black salt finish
steps.detail: Off heat, sprinkle kala namak — taste, add more if you want eggier. Top with chives. Eat on toast.
steps.tip: Black salt only at the end — high heat dulls its sulfur punch.

media.alt: Tofu scramble on toast with chives
media.caption: black salt finish
